description: £{''Why am I even here... fine, whatever.''}£ /n---/n **SENSEI**: On play, reduces cost of all cards in hand by /lightblue/1/ and draws /lightblue/1 card/. If there are /white/3 or more allies/ on the board, draws /lightblue/2 cards/ instead — numb veteran, bigger class, more output.

name: Eri
description: £{''I have more common sense than all of you combined!''}£ /n---/n /pink/Haste/. **HOTBLOODED**: On play, deals /red/2 damage/ to all enemies. If [[Arisa]] is also in play, deals /red/4 damage/ total to all enemies — rivals push each other past their limits.

name: Yumi
description: £{''Goro would know what to do!''}£ /n---/n /pink/Echo/. **DOLPHIN DREAM**: When played, summons a [[Dolphin]] to the board. Her daydreams have a way of becoming real.

name: Arisa
description: £{''Oh, I'm not taking it. I'm simply borrowing it... permanently.''}£ /n---/n /pink/Echo/. **MANIPULATE**: On play, /red/steals 1 ATK/ from every enemy unit. If [[Helga]] is in play, she steals /red/2 ATK/ per enemy instead — the headmistress backing her schemes. #atk#

name: Helga
description: £{''...''}£ /n---/n /lightgreen/Guard/. **HEADMISTRESS**: On play, permanently reduces every enemy's Max HP by /red/2/. She says nothing. She feels nothing. The whole field suffers.

name: Miracle

If she is the /white/last ally/ on the board, she destroys /red/2 enemies/.

name: Faneel
description: £{''I wasn't stealing it. I was just holding it... permanently.''}£ /n---/n /slategray/Snipe/. **KLEPTOMANIAC**: On each attack, /red/steals 1 ATK/ from the target. If the enemy board has /white/3 or more units/, she steals /red/2 ATK/ instead — more targets, more to take. #atk#

name: Ophelia
description: £{''The voices told me to save you, dear lamb.''}£ /n---/n **THE VOICES**: When she attacks, /lightgreen/heals your Nexus for 2/. She believes every drop of blood she draws is an act of mercy.

name: Daphne
description: £{''Humans. Less than bugs.''}£ /n---/n /slategray/Snipe/. **SUBJUGATION**: On play, permanently reduces every enemy's Max HP by /red/3/ AND deals /red/3 damage/ to all enemy units. She arrived to reduce humanity to livestock.

name: Shirayukihime
description: £{''The blade sings. I must answer.''}£ /n---/n /darkred/Haste2/ — strikes twice per turn. **SOUL EATER**: On each attack, /red/steals 1 ATK/ from the target. If she is the /white/only unit/ on the board, steals /red/2 ATK/ — the katana grows most powerful in solitude. #atk#

name: Rimu Hiraga
description: £{''They must be stupid, just like you!''}£ /n---/n /pink/Echo/. **TINKERER**: When played, /lightblue/draws 1 card/. A clumsy inventor who always brings something useful.

description: £{''I will prove I deserve this more than anyone.''}£ /n---/n /pink/Haste/. **RIVAL SPIRIT**: Gains /red/+3 ATK/ when played alone — no allies needed to prove herself. If allies ARE present, she draws /lightblue/1 card/ instead. #atk#

name: Aoi Kananori
description: £{''I just want to understand everything better!''}£ /n---/n /pink/Echo/. **BOOKWORM**: When played, /lightblue/draws 1 card/. If [[Rimu Hiraga]] is on the board, also /lightgreen/heals all allies for 2/ (they bond quickly). #hp#

name: Ayaka Yamanami
description: £{''I'm just a kind and caring caretaker, after all.''}£ /n---/n **DEVOTED**: At the start of each turn, /lightgreen/heals all allies for 1 HP/. She tends to everyone without asking.

name: Shino Okita
description: £{''A smile does not improve combat readiness.''}£ /n---/n /slategray/Snipe/. **BODYGUARD**: On attack, /red/silences/ the target for 1 turn. If she is the /white/only unit/ on your board, also deals /red/+3 bonus snipe damage/ — she is most dangerous alone.

name: Saito Iroha
description: £{''Accidents happen. Just remember, I'm always nearby.''}£ /n---/n /slategray/Snipe/. **HIDDEN BLADE**: On play, /red/silences a random enemy/ for 1 turn. If there are /white/2 or fewer enemies/ on the board, silences /red/2 targets/ instead — nobody expects the airhead.

name: Mai Yamanobe
description: £{''It's just part of being the best listener.''}£ /n---/n **RIVERSIDE CARE**: When she attacks, /lightgreen/heals your Nexus for 2/. Life by the water teaches you to nurture others.

name: Haruka Hijikata
description: £{''And yet, you keep me around. Must be my charm.''}£ /n---/n **COMMANDER**: On play, gives all allies /red/+1 ATK/. If [[Shino Okita]] is also on the board, the bonus becomes /red/+2 ATK/ — discipline and fire working together. #atk#

name: Shogun Kagetora
description: £{''My duty is to ensure peace and prosperity for all.''}£ /n---/n /lightgreen/Guard/. **SHOGUNATE**: At the start of each turn, /lightgreen/heals all allies for 2 HP/. If [[Haruka Hijikata]] AND [[Shino Okita]] are both in play, the heal becomes /lightgreen/+4 HP/ — his full council restored.
